commands.review_summary:
The PR changes cron isolated-run finalization to prefer `agentMeta.lastCallUsage` when deriving the persisted context token snapshot while leaving cumulative usage for billing/token accounting.

PR surface: Source +1. Total +1 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current `finalizeCronRun` persists the context snapshot from accumulated `usage`, while embedded agent metadata separately exposes `lastCallUsage` for the final API call. I did not run the repro because this review is read-only.

target.title: fix(cron): snapshot final-call tokens for isolated runs
target.body:
Fixes #91716.

## Summary
- use `agentMeta.lastCallUsage` for the cron isolated-agent context snapshot when available
- keep cumulative `usage` for input/output token and cost accounting
- preserve the existing fallback to cumulative usage for providers that do not publish a last-call snapshot

## Testing
- Not run locally; full repository checkout/download was not available in this environment, so this PR is limited to the source-inspected one-line fix described in the issue.
target.author: leno23
